evidence.summary: Defines the approved repository, distribution, import, and release-lineage mapping from Modwire to Modwire Architecture.
Verified on 2026-07-17: the former repository URL returns an HTTP 301 redirect to https://github.com/modwire/modwire-architecture.
Explains the 6.0.0 package and import migration, including the intentional absence of compatibility shims.
GitHub preserves an old-to-new repository redirect; historic PyPI artifacts and the old modwire import are intentionally not bridged.
The public project documentation identifies Modwire Architecture and directs users to the 6.0.0 migration guide.
The decision records a pre-release rollback boundary: revert the unpublished 6.0.0 changes and, if necessary, reverse the GitHub repository rename.
The organization owner approved the identity-migration decision before the package migration and repository rename were performed.
